name: triage
description: Production-Telemetry Triage: a read-only, bounded-window source that turns an emitted incident into an incident-Spec feeding spec-gen's RESUME path (never a patch, never an auto-merge). Ingests vitals through one vendor-neutral telemetry adapter (default OTEL/OTLP-JSON; CloudWatch/Dynatrace are backend selections behind the same surface, config-profile-selected — ADR 0006/0013), correlates the runtime event_name to the Verification Manifest's journey + behavior IDs via the §12 join key (DERIVED, not a backref), and emits a completeness:incomplete incident-Spec that references EXISTING behavior IDs and mints none. Bounded-window-only by mechanical guard (never a full-retention/whole-fleet scan); no self-ingestion / open-incident dedupe loop-guard; degrade-to-less-action. Report-only first (ADR 0020): incident-Specs are draft-PR proposals for human review. The sixth independently installable plugin — a new SOURCE feeding the ADLC left edge, not a fourth Tier and not a new quality opinion.
